profile.personality: An intensely reactive and volatile constitution prone to sudden, violent states. The Cantharis personality is characterized by extreme restlessness, constant movement, and a tendency toward explosive outbursts that can escalate rapidly from agitation to full rage. There is a fundamental quality of excess and intensity in all expressions, with the individual being easily overwhelmed by sensory stimuli.
profile.mental_state: The mind is overtaken by intrusive, uncontrollable thoughts that run riot as if driven by an outside force, leading to confusion, delirium, and sudden loss of consciousness. There is a marked tendency toward frenzy triggered by bright or dazzling objects, touch, or attempts to drink water. Cognitive function deteriorates rapidly from strange ideas and confusion into full stupor or violent delirium.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of extreme agitation oscillating between terror, rage, and frenzied sexual excitement, all arising with alarming speed. Fear and restlessness escalate into insolence, blasphemy, and uncharacteristic lewdness—even in normally modest individuals—driven by intense internal inflammation rather than character. The emotional state is fundamentally one of unbearable urgency and torment, where the person is desperate for relief that never comes.

rubric_passages.Back: Violent lancinating pains through the kidneys and back. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Violent lancinating pains through the kidneys and back. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
rubric_passages.Bladder: The bladder and genitals are inflamed and the excitement and congestion of the parts often arouse the sexual instinct, so that there are sexual thoughts and sexual frenzy.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Violent pains with frequent urging. Constant tenesmus.
rubric_passages.Chest: Inflammation of the lungs, gangrenous type, prostration and the lung that is affected burns like fire, and immediately he expectorates cadaverous smelling expectoration, thin, bloody, watery; it has come on in an astonishingly rapid manner.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The most important feature of this medicine is the inflammatory condition, and the most important characteristic in the inflammation is the rapidity with which it develops into a gangrenous state.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Running all through the remedy there is burning. In the head burning, throbbing and stabbing.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the female there is oversensitiveness of all parts. Inflammation of the ovaries and uterus. Burning in the vagina. Membranous dysmenorrhoea. Menses too early, profuse, black.
rubric_passages.Head: Violent, bursting, lancinating headaches as if stabbed with a knife an inflammatory condition that takes hold of the mind violently.
rubric_passages.Mind: Sudden loss of consciousness with red face. Suddenly goes into stupor. Confusion of mind. Overwhelmed with strange ideas. Thoughts run riot, and go whatever way they will, as if possessed by outside influence.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Desire for stool while urinating. The patient will sit on the commode with violent tenesmus to pass urine and stool, feels that if he could only pass a few more drops of urine or a little more bloody stool he would get relief, but no relief comes.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Desire for stool while urinating. The patient will sit on the commode with violent tenesmus to pass urine and stool, feels that if he could only pass a few more drops of urine or a little more bloody stool he would get relief, but no relief comes. All the parts are inflamed and on fire.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: All the parts are inflamed and on fire. Tenesmus and urging not only when the bladder is empty, but often when the bladder is full.
rubric_passages.Skin: Eruptions burn when touched, ever so lightly, i.e., those eruptions such as the remedy could produce.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Burning in the throat. Great thirst, with burning in the throat and stomach. Thirst, with aversion to all fluids, that is, the craving of the mouth and throat are antagonized by the mental state.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Violent, burning in the stomach, pylorus, abdomen.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, burning: Violent, burning in the stomach, pylorus, abdomen.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: The abdomen is swollen and tympanitic; lancinating pains cutting and stabbing. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Burning when urinating. This bloody urine burns like fire in the bladder and about the genitals. Retention or suppression of urine.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: The most important feature of this medicine is the inflammatory condition, and the most important characteristic in the inflammation is the rapidity with which it develops into a gangrenous state.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: Running all through the remedy there is burning. In the head burning, throbbing and stabbing.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Burning in the side of the head. Stitches in the side of the head and occiput.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Great thirst, with burning in the throat and stomach.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion: Thirst, with aversion to all fluids, that is, the craving of the mouth and throat are antagonized by the mental state. Thirst in the throat and an aversion to water in the mind.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is rare that one suffering from gonorrhea has this violent inflammation, with burning and tenesmus of the bladder and rectum, but in such a case this remedy is indicated. The intensity and rapidity are the features of this remedy.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: Inflammation of the ovaries and uterus. When there have been no expulsive pains present to expel the afterbirth, with the symptoms running all through this remedy, after it has been given, normal contractions of the uterus have come on with expulsion of the membranes.

profile.personality: A sluggish, lazy constitution with poor endurance despite a plump, round appearance of false vitality. Obstinate to the extreme, opposing even things they want if suggested by others, with a clumsy and awkward demeanor. They crave stimulants and pungent things, reflecting a deep need for external support to maintain their depleted vital force.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by persistent, tormenting thoughts of suicide that are unwanted and resisted, yet cannot be put aside — these are intrusive impulses rather than desires. There is oversensitivity to all impressions with disturbed and overacute senses, and a general mental sluggishness that makes studying or sustained intellectual work difficult. The patient shows poor reaction and a do-nothing state where the mind, like the body, lacks the vitality to rally.
profile.emotional_pattern: Homesickness is the central emotional theme, accompanied by sleeplessness, fearfulness, and red cheeks — a deep longing for comfort and familiar surroundings. They are perpetually suspicious, always looking for slights and offenses, oversensitive to any perceived insult. After emotional experiences the face flushes red yet remains cold, reflecting the core Capsicum paradox of surface excitation masking inner depletion and chilliness.

rubric_passages.Back, coldness: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches. Coldness of the whole body.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness, dorsal region: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness, dorsal region, scapulae: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness, dorsal region, scapulae,: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Violent tenesmus in rectum, and bladder at the same time. Tenesmus of the bladder; strangury. Burning, biting pain after urination, in old cases of gonorrhoea, in which there no reaction.
rubric_passages.Chill: When the chill begins there is thirst. Thirst after every dysenteric stool, a sudden carving for ice-cold water, which causes chilliness. Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill; it feels cold in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In gouty constitutions, with cracking of the joints and gouty deposits in the joints, stiff joints, clumsy, weak, give out soon. Every cough jars the affected joint.
rubric_passages.Generalities: These constitutions react slowly after diseases and do not respond to remedies, a sluggish state, a tired, lazy constitution. There is sluggishness of the whole economy. They are chilly patients, are sensitive to air, and what to be in a warm room. Even in the ordinary weather the open air causes chilliness. They are sensitive to cold and to bathing.
rubric_passages.Head: Headaches as if the skull would split when moving the head, when walking or coughing. Feeling as if the head would fly to pieces; holds the head with the hand. Feeling as if the head were large, aggravated by coughing and stepping, ameliorated by lying with the head high.
rubric_passages.Mind: In the mental state there is no more striking thing than this symptom: homesickness. A sickness like homesickness runs through the remedy and is accompanied by red cheeks and sleeplessness, hot feeling in the fauces, fearfulness. They are oversensitive to impressions, are always looking for an offence or slight; always suspicious and looking for an insult.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Obstinate to the extreme; it is a devilishness. Even if she wants a certain thing she will oppose it if is proposed by some one else.
rubric_passages.Mouth: On the tongue and lips, flat, sensitive, spreading ulcers with lardaceous base. Taste foul like putrid water. When coughing the air from the lungs causes a pungent offensive taste in the mouth. A hot pungent air comes up from the throat, tasting foul when coughing.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Violent tenesmus in rectum, and bladder at the same time. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
rubric_passages.Respiration: It is useful in perplexing and troublesome chronic hoarseness. He had had a cold and remedies for the acute condition have been given, perhaps two or three remedies, Acon., Bry., Hep., Phos., but all at once you wake up to the fact of his chronic constitutional state of hoarseness. He is rotund, chilly, red faced, and the hoarseness disappears under Capsicum.
rubric_passages.Skin: The skin all over is red and burning, a capillary congestion. The skin is moist and cold, and there is a fine measly condition of the skin due to capillary congestion.
rubric_passages.Sleep: A sickness like homesickness runs through the remedy and is accompanied by red cheeks and sleeplessness, hot feeling in the fauces, fearfulness.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill; it feels cold in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: it feels cold in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, burning: Burning soreness with ulceration in the fauces.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: When the chill begins there is thirst. Thirst after every dysenteric stool, a sudden carving for ice-cold water, which causes chilliness. Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Dysentery. After stool, tenesmus and thirst, and drinking causes shuddering.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Stitches in the suffering part with the cough. Every cough jars the affected joint.
rubric_passages.Appetite: He desires something warm, something stimulating, craves pungent things. This is seen in whisky drinkers; they crave pepper, and the pepper, on the other hand, turns round and craves whisky. These diffusable stimulants crave some stimulating thing, crave support. Dipsomania.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires: He desires something warm, something stimulating, craves pungent things. This is seen in whisky drinkers; they crave pepper, and the pepper, on the other hand, turns round and craves whisky. These diffusable stimulants crave some stimulating thing, crave support.

profile.personality: A sluggish, broken-down constitution marked by profound weakness and poor vitality. The Carbo Animalis individual is someone whose entire system has slowed down, lacking reactive force and energy, plodding along for years with gradually worsening chronic conditions.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by a sense of internal turmoil and anxiety, with rushing sensations of heat as though the body were full of steam, and an awful earthquake-like disturbance through the chest and head. There is a fundamental lack of mental and physical vigor, with prostration and want of energy dominating the picture.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep anxiety accompanies palpitation and circulatory disturbance, with a pervasive sense of sinking and emptiness. The emotional landscape is one of passive suffering rather than acute distress—a quiet, slow deterioration mirroring the sluggish inflammatory processes of the body, punctuated by horrible dreams and disturbed sleep from surging blood to the head.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Whenever this patient puts the child to the breast she has a sensation of emptiness in the stomach, sinking in the pit of the stomach, and she must take the child away.
rubric_passages.Chest: Awful sensation through the chest and in the head, like some great earthquake taking place. These are due to abnormal conditions of the venous side of the heart.
rubric_passages.Chill: growing increasingly sensitive to cold, increasingly chilly, increasingly waxy, until we have phthisis or cancer, with varicose veins and all the conditions that I have described.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The burning pains in the uterus extend down to the thighs.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Suitable in complaints that come on insidiously, that develop slowly, that become chronic and often malignant in character. Complaints in anaemic, broken down constitutions.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The woman has so much burning in the vagina that she persuades the physician to make a more careful examination than he has done. He will probably find the whole cervix inflamed, purple and somewhat, enlarged. She says it burns like coals of fire.
rubric_passages.Head: Surging of blood upward to the head, rousing up in sleep, with horrible dreams. This poor mortal is suffering from troubles in the base of the brain, has tearing pains in the head, and especially of the occiput.
rubric_passages.Mind: Great prostration, want of energy, associated with palpitation, anxiety and disorders of the pulse.
rubric_passages.Skin: Very often a slow quasi-erysipelatous inflammation comes on, the part becomes purple and will pit upon pressure.
rubric_passages.Sleep: rousing up in sleep, with horrible dreams.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Whenever this patient puts the child to the breast she has a sensation of emptiness in the stomach, sinking in the pit of the stomach, and she must take the child away.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: The Carbo animalis woman sinks down at every menstrual period as if she would die. Such striking weakness is not at all accounted for by the quantity of the flow.
rubric_passages.Clinical: This remedy is often a great palliative for the pains that occur in cancer, the indurations and the stinging, burning pains. It has cured these troubles in old feeble constitutions with night-sweats and much bleeding. It has relieved in incurable cases, and has apparently removed the cancerous condition for years, even though it comes back afterward and kills.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: Chronic induration, with enlargement of the uterus, which gradually grows from year to year. Induration of the cervix and the whole uterus. Ulceration of the uterus, going gradually toward the malignant state.

profile.personality: A sluggish, indolent individual who is slow in all functions and averse to both mental and physical exertion. They are the type who has lived on rich, heavy foods and wine, creating a state of torpidity and premature aging. Every little effort brings on a feeling of faintness and collapse, and they simply want to lie down and doze.
profile.mental_state: Mental operations are slow, stupid, and sluggish, with an inability to think clearly or meditate due to cerebral congestion and venous turgescence. The mind is in confusion, benumbed, and cannot be whipped into activity or rouse a desire to do anything. There is marked anxiety on closing the eyes and on waking, with horrible visions, fear of ghosts, and fear of the dark.
profile.emotional_pattern: Profound indifference is the hallmark — affections are practically blotted out, so that the patient cannot feel whether they love their family or hate their enemies, and neither pleasant nor horrible things produce any emotional response. Beneath this apathy lies deep anxiety, especially at night, with a dread of darkness and a sense of impending doom centered in the chest. They want to be left alone, are easily frightened, and sleep is filled with such terror that they dread going to sleep at all.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: A striking abdominal symptom of Carbo veg. is that the flatus collects here and there in the intestine as if it were in a lump incarcerated flatus; a constriction of the intestine will hold it in one place so that it feels like a lump or tumor, that finally disappears.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, rumbling: Extremely putrid flatus escapes making the patient very offensive.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Old chronic catarrhal conditions of the bladder, when the urine contains mucus, especially in old people, with cold face, cold extremities and cold sweat.
rubric_passages.Chest: Weakness of the chest when coughing. He feels that there is not enough force in the muscle of the chest to get up a good cough, or to help him carry on the breathing.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Oozing of blood, with palpitation tumultuous action of the heart. The pounding goes on like a great machine, shaking the whole body.
rubric_passages.Chill: The fever is violent; it has a violent rigor or chill. Of course during the chill he is cold, but there is one strange feature, he wants cold water during the chill, and when the fever comes on he has no thirst.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In going over the remedy I have said so much about the limbs, their coldness and the cold sweat, that I have practically covered most of the symptoms that belong to the extremities.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: The extremities are cold clear to the body; not only the hands, but the whole upper extremities; and not only the feet, but the limbs clear to the body, are cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: Hands and feet cold and dry, or cold and moist.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Sluggishness is a good word to think of when examining the pathogenesis of Carbo veg. Sluggishness, laziness, turgescence, these are words that will come into your mind frequently, because these, states occur so frequently in the symptomatology. Everything about the economy is sluggish, turgid, distended and swollen.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the woman the relaxation is manifested by a dragging down sensation; dragging down of the uterus, as if the internal parts would escape. The uterus drags down so that she cannot stand on her feet. All the internal organs feel heavy and hang down.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are mostly occipital. His whole head is turgid, full, distended. He feels as if the scalp was too tight. Everything is bound up in the head. Awful occipital headaches.
rubric_passages.Mind: The whole mental state, like the physical, is slow. The mental operations are slow. Slow to think; sluggish; stupid; lazy. Cannot whip himself into activity, or rouse a desire to do anything. Wants to lie down and doze.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The mouth and throat are filled with little purple aphthous ulcers, which were little white spots to begin with, but they have grown purplish and now ooze black blood. These aphthous patches bleed easily, burn and sting.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Smarting, dryness of the mouth with bleeding aphthous ulcers.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Itching, burning and rawness of the anus and round about, are strong features of Carbo veg.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Soreness in all diarrheic conditions - soreness to pressure over the abdomen. Round about the anus, in children, there is excoriation. The parts are red, raw and bleeding, and they itch.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Itching, burning and rawness of the anus and round about, are strong features of Carbo veg.
rubric_passages.Respiration: The Carbo veg. patient suffers very much from difficulties of breathing. Suffocation; cannot lie down. A feeling of weakness in the chest, as if he could not get another breath.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Sometimes the difficulty is asthmatic. The remedy cures asthma. We will see the patient propped up in a chair by an open window, or some members of the family may be fanning him as fast as possible.
rubric_passages.Skin: The skin is dusky. The capillary circulation is engorged. The face is purple. Any little stimulating food or drink will bring a flush to that dusky face.
rubric_passages.Sleep: In Carbo veg. the sleep is so full of anxiety that it may be said to be awful. On going to sleep there is anxiety, suffering, jerking, twitching, and he has the horrors. Everything is horrible. Horrible visions; sees ghosts.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: A peculiar sluggish, death-like sleep, with visions. The Carbo veg. patient wakens in anxiety and covered with cold sweat. Exhaustion. Unrefreshed after sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach: He has burning in the stomach, distension of the stomach, constant eructations, flatulence, passing offensive flatus.

profile.personality: A deeply irritable and capricious individual who alternates between exhilaration bordering on drunkenness and profound indolence and mental sluggishness. They are averse to company and being spoken to, preferring to sit in silence, yet can become talkative and hilarious before lapsing into moroseness and confusion.
profile.mental_state: Marked by progressive mental deterioration with absent-mindedness, difficulty concentrating, and a dullness of mind especially in the morning. Memory is weak with misplacement of words when writing and inability to find the right word, accompanied by confusion as if intoxicated and eventual stupefaction and imbecility.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by deep anxiety about the future and fear of death, insanity, misfortune, and people, with a pronounced fear of walking in the dark. The emotional state is highly unstable, constantly changing between sadness, rage, weeping alternating with laughing, and religious preoccupation, often culminating in despair, discouragement, and violent or maniacal outbursts.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: Hardness of the abdomen; of the liver.
rubric_passages.Back: Pain in the back; night; on breathing; during chill; during menses; on motion, while sitting. Pain in cervical region; between scapulae. Pain in lumbar region morning on waking; during menses; while sitting.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness: Coldness of the back; lumbar region.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back; night; on breathing; during chill; during menses; on motion, while sitting.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region: A heavy load between the scapulae. Burning in back; between scapulae. Pain in cervical region; between scapulae.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Catarrh of the bladder with mucous sediment in the urine; pain in the bladder; aching; cramping in the neck of the bladder; pressing pain; stitching in the anus and neck of the bladder to the urethra during urination.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Urination; dribbling; dysuria; feeble stream; frequent, especially at night; involuntary at night, in sleep.
rubric_passages.Chest: Anxiety in chest; in the heart. Very stubborn catarrh of chest. A sensation of coldness in chest. VIOLENT OPPRESSION OF CHEST. A continuous sensation of weakness in chest.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation of heart in evening, in anaemic patients; with anxiety; from slight exertion; from motion; visible; tumultuous.
rubric_passages.Chill: Coldness in morning in bed; in afternoon; evening; 7 P.M.; 8 P.M. Icy coldness. Chilliness during menses. Chill after eating; in evening; then sweat, during sleep.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Pain in limbs; during chill; PAROXYSMAL; rheumatic; in joints; gouty. SORE, BRUISED LIMBS; joints; upper limbs; lower limbs; thighs; legs; soles when walking.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Coldness of limbs; with headache. Upper arms; hands; fingers; lower limbs; knees; legs; FEET in evening in bed.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: Coldness of limbs; with headache. Upper arms; hands; fingers; lower limbs; knees; legs; FEET in evening in bed.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis of extensors of wrist; of lower limbs.
rubric_passages.Generalities: It is a remedy of great depth of action, frequently indicated and long neglected. EXTREME WEAKNESS in the morning; in old drunkards; in the heat of summer; during menses; after stool.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Fainting followed by stupefaction and loss of memory.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: EXTREME WEAKNESS in the morning; in old drunkards; in the heat of summer; during menses; after stool. Painful weariness in the morning.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Atrophy of the ovaries. Cancer of the uterus. Aversion to coition. Eruption and excoriation. Inflammation of the uterus. Itching of the vulva. LEUCORRHOEA ACRID bloody; burning; copious; before and after menses; milky thin white; watery.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Pain in uterus; burning; soreness; weak labor pains.
rubric_passages.Head: Pain in the head in the morning in bed; on waking; at 9 A.M.; in the afternoon; in the evening; at night; 10 P.M.; better in the open air; worse ascending steps, binding up the hair; after breakfast; after dinner; after eating; from becoming heated; from a jar; from heavy stepping; from mental exertion; from motion; from shaking the head; after sleep; after stool; in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion, vertex: Heat in the afternoon; in forehead; IN VERTEX. Hyperaemia of the brain.
rubric_passages.Mind: Very absent minded and so irascible that he breaks things that happen to be in his hands; when spoken to. Anxiety in the morning; evening in bed; night; before midnight; of conscience, with fear; about the future; before menses.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Very absent minded and so irascible that he breaks things that happen to be in his hands; when spoken to. Irritability in the morning.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Very restless during the night; worse before midnight.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, night: Very restless during the night; worse before midnight.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Anesthesia of mouth and tongue. Aphthae of month and tongue. Bleeding of month and gums. The tongue feels cold. The tongue is cracked.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: dryness of mouth and tongue in the morning with unquenchable thirst.

profile.personality: The Carduus Marianus constitutional type is a sedentary, chilly individual prone to hepatic and bilious complaints, highly sensitive to cold and aggravated by motion. They tend toward periodic crises — cyclical sick headaches, bilious attacks, and congestive episodes — suggesting a constitution that accumulates toxicity and purges in waves.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by dullness and congestion rather than acute anxiety, with the heaviness and fullness in the head reflecting a general mental torpor tied to portal and hepatic congestion. There is little intellectual excitability described; the mind is weighed down in parallel with the physical sluggishness of the liver and digestive system.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional triad is sadness, irritability, and weeping — a despondent, easily vexed temperament that breaks into tears. This mirrors the underlying hepatic congestion: the emotional life is burdened and stagnant, prone to periodic overflow, much as the physical body accumulates bile and discharges it in violent episodes.

rubric_passages.Back: Pain in the back under the right scapula (much like Chel. and Aesc.). Drawing pains in the back. Sensitive spine.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back under the right scapula (much like Chel. and Aesc.). Drawing pains in the back. Sensitive spine.
rubric_passages.Chest: Pains in the chest with liver pains. Stitching pains. Drawing pains, aggravated by motion.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Cramping, drawing, pressing, rheumatic pains in the limbs. Violent pain in the right deltoid. Pain in the hip joints, aggravated from rising, stooping, and motion. Neuralgic pains in the lower limbs, worse from motion. Edema of the feet. Varicose veins. Ulcers. Rheumatism, and jerking of the muscles. Cramps in the calves and feet. Walking almost impossible.
rubric_passages.Generalities: There are many pains, pressing, dragging, drawing, burning; worse from motion. The patient is very sensitive to cold, and is subject to attacks of bilious vomiting at regular or irregular intervals.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Taste bitter, insipid, or wanting. Foul tongue.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Burning in rectum, and anus. Itching piles. Bleeding piles. Inveterate constipation.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Drawing pains from left to right in the stomach. Burning in the stomach. Vomiting blood, very black. Nausea, and vomiting mucus, then bile. Painful retching, and then vomiting sour greenish fluid.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Drawing pains from left to right in the stomach. Burning in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Drawing, stitching or burning pains in the abdomen. Distended abdomen. Cutting pains.
rubric_passages.Clinical: The author has cured many violent sick headaches ending in vomiting bile, and cases in the habit of taking calomel, with this remedy (Sang.). Dropsical effusions with liver diseases. It is useful in hemorrhages and jaundice, when symptoms agree.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: The most important of all the liver symptoms. Dragging pain in right hypochondrium when lying on left side; like Arn., Mag. m., Nat. s. and Ptelea. Pressing, drawing, stitching in right lobe of liver. Sore, bruised, hard liver; sometimes the left lobe, but oftener the right.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Drawing, stitching or burning pains in the abdomen. Distended abdomen. Cutting pains. Dragging pain in right hypochondrium when lying on left side.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Pains in the chest with liver pains. Stitching pains. Drawing pains, aggravated by motion.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, pressing: There are many pains, pressing, dragging, drawing, burning; worse from motion.
rubric_passages.Stool: The stool is black. Stool hard and knotty. Clay-like, bileless stool.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Cramping, drawing, pressing, rheumatic pains in the limbs. Violent pain in the right deltoid. Pain in the hip joints, aggravated from rising, stooping, and motion. Neuralgic pains in the lower limbs, worse from motion.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, colic: This remedy establishes a healthy flow of bile, and thereby cures the condition that favors the formation of gall stones. It has many times broken up the tendency to gall stone colic.
rubric_passages.Clinical, colic: It has many times broken up the tendency to gall stone colic.
rubric_passages.Skin, discoloration: It is useful in hemorrhages and jaundice, when symptoms agree.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain, liver: Pressing, drawing, stitching in right lobe of liver. Dragging pain in right hypochondrium when lying on left side; like Arn., Mag. m., Nat. s. and Ptelea.

profile.personality: A slowly declining, broken-down constitution marked by progressive weakness, fatigue, and paralytic heaviness. The Causticum type is deeply sensitive to their environment—unable to tolerate extremes of heat or cold—and carries a fundamental rigidity in both body and temperament, with a tendency toward contracture and stiffening at every level.
profile.mental_state: The mind is clouded by exhaustion and confusion, progressing from an inability to think clearly into a state of passive mental deterioration and imbecility. There is a constant foreboding that something terrible is about to happen—an anticipatory anxiety that dominates all thought—coupled with hopelessness and an inability to carry on ordinary business or reasoning.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is one of melancholy, hopelessness, and timorous anxiety, rooted in prolonged grief, sorrow, and vexation. The patient is overwhelmed by fearful fancies—fear of death, fear for family, dread of impending catastrophe—and grows increasingly excitable and hysterical, losing emotional balance so that the more they dwell on their troubles, the worse everything becomes.

rubric_passages.Bladder: This remedy has two kinds of paralysis of the bladder, one affecting the muscles of expulsion and the urine is retained, and the other center ing upon the sphincter vesicae, and then the urine is passed involuntarily.
rubric_passages.Chill: Worse from exposure to cold, dry wind. It also has rheumatic complaints aggravated in the warm, damp days, in wet weather, but this is not so striking.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Stiffness in the limbs, through the hips and in the back, so that he rises up from sitting or the recumbent posture with great difficulty.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Gradual decrease of muscular power, a paralysis. Paralysis of the oesophagus, paralysis of the throat, such as occurs after diphtheria; paralysis of the upper eyelids; paralysis of the bladder; paralysis of the limbs, of the lower limbs; great lassitude, muscular relaxation, indescribable fatigue and heaviness of the body.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Causticum is a very searching medicine, suitable in old, broken down constitutions, suffering from chronic diseases. Only occasionally is it indicated in acute diseases. Its complaints are such as are progressive, slow, and accompanying a declining state of the economy.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The woman suffers from many annoyances during menstruation just about the time for the flow to start violent cramp-like pains come on. In a woman who is nursing a child the milk almost disappears in consequence of fatigue, night watching and anxiety. The nipples get sore and crack, another instance of the tendency to form fissures.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Anxious dreams before menstruation; melancholy; cramp-like spasms; pains in the back.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are, as a rule, nondescript; only occasion do we find a Causticum headache standing out by itself. It will usually be associated with rheumatic and gouty conditions which also affect the scalp. The scalp contracts and tightens up in places like the contractures in other parts. Rheumatic headaches; sometimes the pain is so severe as to cause nausea, and vomiting. Blinding headaches followed by paralysis.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Everything excites him. The more he thinks about his complaints, the worse they become. Mental and other ailments from long-lasting grief and sorrow. The injurious effects of fear and prolonged vexation. Tired from vexations of business.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth and throat; rawness of the throat; must swallow constantly on account of a sensation of fullness in the throat, a nervous feeling in the throat.
rubric_passages.Rectum: In the rectum there is the same tendency to paralytic weakness that is found in other parts of the body. It is inactive and fills up with hard faeces, which pass involuntarily and unnoticed.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipation, frequent, unsuccessful urging to stool. The stool is tough and shining, and is passed with great difficulty and exertion.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Fissures in the anus; itching and stitching in the rectum, excessive itching day and night; hemorrhoids, pulsating in the perineum I fissures and hemorrhoids pulsate and burn like fire.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain, burning: Fissures and hemorrhoids pulsate and burn like fire.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Great soreness and tightness of the chest, oppression of the chest it feels as if a load were upon it. It seems to be filling up with mucus, and the patient coughs until he raises a mouthful and then he feels a little better for a time.
rubric_passages.Skin: Another very strong feature of this medicine is its tendency to grow warts. Warts on the face, on the tip of the nose, on the ends of the fingers, on the hands. Hard, dry, horny warts come out on various parts of the body.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Starting in sleep; twitching and jerking; the child is easily startled, or acts as if startled without cause.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: Now, with all these sufferings the patient is slowly growing weaker, till at length he can no longer walk, he can no longer sit up, he is so tired and weak that he must lie down. He is tired in body and mind. It is a paralytic fatigue.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires, meat: Desire for beer, smoked meats, pungent things, aversion to sweet things and delicacies.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Causticum has belching, nausea, vomiting, distension and violent pains in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: There is a queer sensation in the stomach as if lime were slaking there. Trembling in the stomach; burning. Bread causes a sensation of heaviness and pressure, coffee seems to aggravate all the symptoms of the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Thirst after eating; thirst for cool drinks with aversion to water.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: He urinates so easily that he is not sensible of the stream and scarcely believes, in the dark, that he is urinating, until he makes sure by sense of touch.

profile.personality: Extremely sensitive constitutional type, hypersensitive to all impressions — pain, surroundings, and people. Naturally belongs to the nervous, overwrought temperament, particularly in women and children, where even slight stimuli produce disproportionate suffering and reaction.
profile.mental_state: Marked irritability inseparable from the heightened sensitivity, with an inability to control temper when aroused — the mind is driven to frenzy by pain. Alternates between snappish quarrelsomeness and silent, melancholic introspection, sitting and looking within when pains are absent. Capricious and restless, constantly wanting something new yet refusing everything offered.
profile.emotional_pattern: Easily affected by mortification, chagrin, and anger, which act as exciting causes for physical symptoms including convulsions, colic, and neuralgia. Loss of generosity and consideration for others' feelings when suffering — will scold, quarrel, and drive people away regardless of social propriety. The core pattern is an oversensitiveness to pain coupled with violent emotional reactivity, producing a state where the patient is never satisfied, never at peace, and cannot be consoled.

rubric_passages.Back: Labor pains that are felt too much in the back. Contractions that are most painful, cutting, tearing, bringing out screams.
rubric_passages.Chest: There are many suffocative attacks and difficulties of breathing, inflammation of the larynx, that you can read up easily.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Stitching pains in the limbs. Cramping in the muscles. Limbs go to sleep. With the pains in the limbs, and sometimes in other parts, but particularly in the limbs, a benumbed feeling, or pains with the feeling of deadness, pains accompanied by a benumbed feeling; sometimes almost complete loss of sensation of the skin, yet the pains in the long nerves in the extremities are very violent, and the patient seems just as sensitive to pain as at other times.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The general constitutional state of Chamomilla is great sensitiveness; sensitive to every impression; sensitive to surroundings; sensitive to persons; and, above all, sensitive to pain.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The menstrual flow is black, clotted, offensive. Cramping pains in the uterus, clutching and griping, ameliorated by heat.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Menstrual colic following anger, which means violent cramping pains in the uterus during menstruation if she has had any great excitement to anger her.
rubric_passages.Head: Throbbing, tearing, bursting pains. Congestive headaches. Worse when thinking of the pain, or when thinking about the sufferings. The headaches are worse evenings.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental state goes along with this. Sensitiveness of the mind. Great irritability. These two run through Chamomilla so closely that they are inseparable.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: The irritability is so great that it manifests itself sometimes in a very singular way. The patient seems to be driven to frenzy by the pains, and she forgets all about her prudence and her diplomacy.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Offensive foetid smell from the mouth.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Also constipation, with no ability to strain. A paralytic weakness of the rectum; inactivity of the rectum. Anus is "pouting," with swollen appearance and redness.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Spasms of the larynx during cough, or without cough. Spasmodic constriction of the larynx. Choking.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: There are many suffocative attacks and difficulties of breathing.
rubric_passages.Skin: sometimes almost complete loss of sensation of the skin, yet the pains in the long nerves in the extremities are very violent, and the patient seems just as sensitive to pain as at other times.
rubric_passages.Sleep: The Chamomilla patient can not go to sleep at night. He is sleepy, like Bell., but he cannot sleep. If he quiets down during the day he wants to go to sleep. But as soon as the time comes to go to bed he is wide awake, he is sleepless and restless at night, especially the fore part.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Chamomilla has much vomiting. Eructations of gas which smells like sulphuretted hydrogen. The Chamomilla patient has violent retching. Making violent efforts to vomit. Seems that it will tear the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Eructations of gas which smells like sulphuretted hydrogen.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Pain in the stomach and abdomen, The child doubles up, and screams, and kicks.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Want of appetite. Great thirst for cold water and desire for acid drinks. Unquenchable thirst.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Colic, especially in the little ones, in the infants. Pain in the stomach and abdomen, The child doubles up, and screams, and kicks; wants to be carried; is extremely irritable; attack comes on in the evening; one side of the face red, the other side pale.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Neuralgic pains all over the body with numbness. Twitching, darting, tingling pains. The pains are mostly ameliorated by heat, with the exception of the teeth and jaws.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: Congestion to the head. Violent neuralgia of the face, teeth, ear sides of the head.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet: Aversion to talk, and snappish. The patient is constantly sitting and looking within herself when pains are absent.

profile.personality: A sluggish, bilious constitution marked by mental and physical heaviness, with strong aversion to exertion and conversation. The patient is indolent, weary, and disinclined to work, preferring to remain still and undisturbed.
profile.mental_state: The mind is slow, foggy, and unable to concentrate, with confusion, dizziness, and an inability to think or meditate clearly. There is a marked distaste for mental exertion, and the sensorium is frequently disturbed with vertigo progressing to nausea.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep sadness and melancholy predominate, with a brooding quality as if some crime has been committed or a dreadful event is imminent. Persistent anxiety allows no rest day or night, accompanied by weeping despondency and a foreboding sense that death is near.

rubric_passages.Back, pain: Hard pains felt through the back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region: Pains from the region of the liver, shooting towards the back and shoulders.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae: Dull aching pains under the right scapula; sharp, shooting pains under the right scapula
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae, rig: Dull aching pains under the right scapula; sharp, shooting pains under the right scapula
And then more intense pain felt under the right scapula. Dull aching pains under the right scapula; sharp, shooting pains under the right scapula
rubric_passages.Chest: Right-sided pneumonia, complicated with liver troubles, or jaundice.
rubric_passages.Chill: It has sharp, febrile attacks, such as found in pneumonia with chill and in inflammation of the liver. It has cured intermittent fever, coming in the afternoon and evening.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In the limbs there are rheumatic and neuralgic pains. Neuralgia of the limbs in general, most violent. Limbs feel heavy and stiff. Limbs flabby.
rubric_passages.Generalities: All of the pains are extremely aggravated from motion. All its complaints are brought on from changes in the weather. He cannot stand weather changes, either too cold or too warm.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: The right-sidedness is marked, and but small portions of the left lung are involved. In many instances it prefers the right side.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are brought on from heat, unlike the stomach and the liver, and the lungs, etc. The head is aggravated from motion, aggravated from beat, aggravated from a warm room, aggravated from warm applications.
rubric_passages.Mind: Sadness and anxiety. Anxiety, allowing no rest. Sadness, as if she had committed a crime; as if some dreadful thing was going to happen. So sad that she thinks she must die. Weeping despondency. Distaste for mental exertion and conversation.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Bilious diarrhoea. Along with jaundice, clay-like, pale, faecal, puttylike stool. Bileless stool. Diarrhea and constipation alternate.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Difficult respiration, with short fits of coughing. Short, quick breathing.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Difficult breathing; tightness over the chest as if breathing would be hindered. Anxiety as if he must choke. Difficult respiration, with short fits of coughing.
rubric_passages.Skin: The skin is likely to be sallow, and gradually increases to a marked jaundice in connection with these complaints. Itching of the skin. jaundice. It has cured old putrid ulcers.
rubric_passages.Stomach: A feeling of anguish in the pit of the stomach. Persistent pain in the stomach; aggravated by motion and ameliorated by eructations. Constriction and sensitiveness in the pit of the stomach. Constant aching pain in the stomach, ameliorated by food.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Persistent pain in the stomach; aggravated by motion and ameliorated by eructations. Constant aching pain in the stomach, ameliorated by food. Constrictive, pinching pain in the stomach better from drawing up the limbs and lying on the left side, ameliorated by eating.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: Things go round in a circle. Dizziness comes, and it does not let up until nausea, and sometimes vomiting, follows. So much turning in the head that he vomits.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Spasmodic pain in the region of the liver. Pressing pain in the region of the liver. The right hypochondrium is tense and painful to pressure.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: All of the pains are extremely aggravated from motion. The pains are ameliorated by heat.

profile.personality: A deeply weakened, cold, and withdrawn constitutional type who is hypersensitive to environmental stimuli and easily exhausted by any physical or mental exertion. They are conscientious to the point of being overly scrupulous about trifles, yet simultaneously indifferent to pleasures and averse to work or social engagement.
profile.mental_state: The mind is characterized by dullness, confusion (especially on waking), and forgetfulness, alternating with periods of mental excitability and an overwhelming flood of ideas at night that prevents rest. There is a marked tendency toward suspicion, hypercriticism of close friends, and an oversensitivity that leads them to search for insults where none are intended.
profile.emotional_pattern: Profound sadness and despondency dominate, deepening into despair, loathing of life, and even suicidal ideation, with emotional states strongly tied to periodic febrile cycles (worse during chill and fever). Anxiety is pervasive—worst in the evening and on waking—manifesting as fearfulness, restlessness that drives them out of bed, and a sentimental yet irritable disposition that oscillates between silent withdrawal and angry refusal to communicate.

rubric_passages.Chest: Anxiety in chest, region of heart. Constriction. Hemorrhage of lungs. Oppression of chest. Pain in the chest, during cough. Pains in the sides of the chest. Rawness in the chest. Stitching in the chest on coughing, Stitching in the heart. Palpitation of the heart, anxious, aggravated on slight exertion, leaning back against chair; violent. Sensation as if heart ceased to beat. Full pulse. Weakness in chest. Weakness of respiratory muscles.
rubric_passages.Chill: CHILL, morning, forenoon, noon, AFTERNOON evening, night, midnight; open air; walking in the open air; anticipating; in bed. Drinking aggravates chill. Quotidian chill; quotidian or tertian. Hard, shaking chill. Chill like cold waves with gooseflesh all over body. Warm room ameliorates. External warmth ameliorates.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Periodicity is most marked. Pulsation all over the body. Pulse fast, feeble and irregular. Relaxed and flabby (Calc.). Sensitive to pain. Many symptoms come during sleep. Standing increases many symptoms. Sensitive to touch. Trembling. Walking in the open air aggravates. Weakness from walking. Complaints come on in windy, stormy weather.
rubric_passages.Mind: Easily angered, and refuses to talk or to answer questions. Anxiety day and night, but worse in the evening, worse during chill; anxiety with fear. Anxiety during fever, even becomes wild. Anxiety on waking. Desires things which he cares nothing for after he gets them. Becomes critical with his most intimate friends. Complaining. Confusion of mind in the morning on waking.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Burning canker sores in the mouth. Bleeding from mucous membranes of the mouth. Cracked tongue, Tongue black, brown, white or yellow. Dry mouth and tongue. Hot mouth. Burning rawness of the tongue. Sore tongue. Salivation. Swollen gums and tongue. Taste bad, bitter while eating; insipid, metallic, saltish, sour, sweetish. Vesicles on the tongue.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Diarrhea, morning, afternoon, NIGHT, after midnight; after cold drinks; from taking cold; AFTER EATING; after fruit; in hot weather. Dysentery. Much flatus, offensive. Bleeding from anus. Hemorrhoids. Involuntary stool and urine. Itching of the anus. Moisture about the anus. Pain in the anus during stool. Burning in the anus during diarrhea, during stool. Pressing pain. Stitching. Paralytic weakness of the rectum. Ineffectual urging to stool.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Appetite diminished, or ravenous. No appetite for breakfast. Strong appetite without relish of food. Aversion to rich food and fats; aversion to food, to meat. Desires wine; cold drinks, sour things, sweet things. Sensation of coldness in the stomach. Emptiness, better by eating. Eructations after eating, bitter, empty, of food, sour. Water brash. Sensation of fullness after eating. Heartburn. Great weight in the stomach after eating. Hiccough. Stomach easily disordered.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Pain in the stomach from coughing; after eating. Burning; cramping; pressing, soreness; stitching, tearing.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, pressing: Burning; cramping; pressing, soreness; stitching, tearing.
rubric_passages.Stool: Stool bilious, black, bloody, clay colored, copious, frequent, LIENTERIC, offensive, liquid, water. Diarrhea with intermittent fever.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting: Vomiting at night, on coughing, after drinking, after eating, with headache; of bile black, blood, food, mucus; sour; water. Nausea and vomiting followed by sleep. Sudden inclination to vomit at 2 P.M.
rubric_passages.Mouth, tongue: Cracked tongue, Tongue black, brown, white or yellow. Dry mouth and tongue. Burning rawness of the tongue. Sore tongue. Swollen gums and tongue. Vesicles on the tongue.
rubric_passages.Expectoration: Expectoration bloody, copious; difficult; mucus, offensive, purulent; tastes bitter, flat, salty. Expectoration is viscid, white.
rubric_passages.Fever: High fever follows chill. Fever without chill afternoon and evening. Fever and chill alternate. Burning fever. Feverish all the time, but more so at night. Dry heat at night. Hectic fever. Heat during sleep. Chill, heat, then sweat. During the beat be desires to uncover.
rubric_passages.Nose: Coryza with discharge. Dry coryza. Nasal catarrh with bloody discharge, or purulent discharge. Dryness in the nose. Epistaxis. Nose obstructed. Sneezing. Excoriation of the corners of the nose. Especially useful for periodical coryza and frequent taking cold in the nose which keeps a catarrh in constant activity.
rubric_passages.Perspiration: Perspiration, morning, night; during anxiety. COLD; from coughing; with weakness; during slight exertion; following fever; from motion; PROFUSE; during sleep; after waking; staining linen yellow. Symptoms increase while perspiring.
rubric_passages.Perspiration, cold: COLD; from coughing; with weakness; during slight exertion; following fever; from motion; PROFUSE; during sleep; after waking; staining linen yellow.
rubric_passages.Perspiration, profuse: Perspiration, morning, night; during anxiety. COLD; from coughing; with weakness; during slight exertion; following fever; from motion; PROFUSE; during sleep; after waking; staining linen yellow.
rubric_passages.Rectum, diarrhea: Diarrhea, morning, afternoon, NIGHT, after midnight; after cold drinks; from taking cold; AFTER EATING; after fruit; in hot weather.
Vomiting at night, on coughing, after drinking, after eating, with headache; of bile black, blood, food, mucus; sour; water.
rubric_passages.Stool, lienteric: Stool bilious, black, bloody, clay colored, copious, frequent, LIENTERIC, offensive, liquid, water.
rubric_passages.Mouth, discoloration, tongue: Tongue black, brown, white or yellow.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting, eating: Vomiting at night, on coughing, after drinking, after eating, with headache; of bile black, blood, food, mucus; sour; water.
rubric_passages.Stomach, vomiting, eating, after: Vomiting at night, on coughing, after drinking, after eating, with headache; of bile black, blood, food, mucus; sour; water.
rubric_passages.Chill, afternoon: CHILL, morning, forenoon, noon, AFTERNOON evening, night, midnight; open air; walking in the open air; anticipating; in bed.
rubric_passages.Expectoration, mucous: Expectoration bloody, copious; difficult; mucus, offensive, purulent; tastes bitter, flat, salty. Expectoration is viscid, white.
rubric_passages.Fever, night: Feverish all the time, but more so at night. Dry heat at night.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive and withdrawn individual who shuns society and prefers solitude, with a tendency toward suspicion and overestimation of self. Between acute episodes, the temperament is mild, gentle, placid, and yielding, yet underneath lies a profound pessimism and darkness.
profile.mental_state: Marked by confusion of identity and disorientation—confuses present with past, imagines being a child, and finds familiar people and places strangely unrecognizable. Mental torpor with complete memory blanks, loss of ideas, and an inability to distinguish between appropriate and inappropriate things, leading to strange desires and childish behavior.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by sadness, anxiety, and a dark foreboding about the future, with a deep sensitivity to sad stories and frightening stimuli. Fear is pervasive—fear of company, fear of strange surroundings, and fright intense enough to trigger physical crises—alternating with periods of gentle placidity and occasional outbursts of agitated wailing or childlike exuberance.

rubric_passages.Back: Spasmodic symptoms of the back. Opisthotonos.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: the head is drawn back opisthotonos all the limbs are convulsed and rigid.
rubric_passages.Chest: Cold sensation in the chest. Spasms of the chest.
rubric_passages.Extremities: All conditions of the limbs are of a spasmodic character.
rubric_passages.Generalities: This remedy is of interest because of its convulsive tendency. It puts the whole nervous system in such a state of increased irritability that pressure on a part causes convulsions.
rubric_passages.Head: Headache as if the brain were loose on walking. When thinking of the exact nature of the pain it ceased.
rubric_passages.Mind: Wants to be alone; dislike to society. Singing, shouting, dancing; likes toys, jumps about like a child. Lies in bed lamenting and wailing. Great agitation; child grasps at one's clothing in a frightened manner.
rubric_passages.Skin: It has troubles from shaving; it is useful in such eruptions as come in the whiskers; barber's itch; a solid crop of eruptions all over the face wherever the whiskers grow. Eruptions on the cheek like eczema.
rubric_passages.Stomach: An aura in the stomach gives warning of the convulsion.
rubric_passages.Stomach, distension: if the stomach is disordered or chilled, or if he has fear or other mental conditions, convulsions come on.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: An aura in the stomach gives warning of the convulsion.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: With severe pains in the bowels come convulsive movements and convulsions.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: there may be compression and yet all the pains be in distant parts; drawing of the muscles and cramps.
rubric_passages.Appetite: This patient has strange desires; desires to eat coal and many other strange articles, because he is unable to distinguish between things edible and things unfit to be eaten; eats coal and raw potatoes.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires: This patient has strange desires; desires to eat coal and many other strange articles, because he is unable to distinguish between things edible and things unfit to be eaten; eats coal and raw potatoes.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured traumatic tetanus lockjaw, epilepsy, epileptiform convulsions.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, heart: Feels as if the heart stopped beating.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: With severe pains in the bowels come convulsive movements and convulsions.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region, back: Spasmodic symptoms of the back. Opisthotonos.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Some complaints spread from the chest, especially from the heart; the rigors and chills begin in the chest; and there is a sensation of coldness about the heart; and from there it extends to other parts.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region: Spasmodic symptoms of the back. Opisthotonos.
rubric_passages.Face: Eruptions on the cheek like eczema. Swelling of the submaxillary glands. Erysipelatous eruptions.
rubric_passages.Generalities, lying: He recollects nothing that took place or that he said during a certain period. He knows nobody, and lies without recognizing anyone, but when asked questions he answers correctly.
rubric_passages.Mind, sadness: The Cicuta patient, out of the convulsion, is full of sadness, anxiety, and darkness, borrows trouble from the future, is affected by sad stories, is pessimistic.

profile.personality: Extremely sensitive and irritable, both mentally and physically, with a marked touchiness that pervades the entire constitution. The Cina type is restless, easily disturbed by any external stimulus including being looked at or touched, yet paradoxically craves motion and being carried. There is a fundamental dissatisfaction — wanting something but not knowing what — combined with an inability to tolerate any form of interference or disturbance.
profile.mental_state: The mind is hyperesthetic and easily overwhelmed, with disturbances of perception including hallucinations of smell, sight, and taste, and a tendency for dreams to persist into waking consciousness. Mental upset directly disorders digestion and physical function, reflecting a strong brain-gut axis where emotional shocks such as fright, punishment, or scolding immediately produce somatic symptoms. There is a pervasive restlessness with inability to settle, and convulsive reactions to stimuli that would be minor for others.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of anxious irritability with whining, complaining, and screaming — particularly upon waking or when disturbed. There is a deep-seated fearfulness with night terrors, fright on waking, and trembling with anxiety, alongside a contradictory need for comfort and contact despite being aggravated by touch. The emotional state is capricious and inconsolable, resembling Chamomilla but with more anxiety and sensory overwhelm than pure anger.

rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: There is coldness of the, extremities and also some itching of the skin, but the head symptoms are predominant.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: This patient is disturbed by everything, worse after eating even a moderate meal.
rubric_passages.Skin: The skin is sensitive to touch.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, gnawing: When there is gnawing in the stomach after eating, or when the child has taken all it can hold yet cries for the bottle, or empties its stomach by spitting up and vomiting the food and then reaches out whining and crying for more, think of Cina.
rubric_passages.Mind, night: The child takes a moderate supper and dreams all night, jerks and twitches in sleep, rouses up in a fright, talks excitedly about what he has dreamed, thinks it is real, and sees dogs, phantoms, and frightful things lie has dreamed about.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleeplessness: Child cannot sleep unless on the belly or in constant motion.
rubric_passages.Stomach, heaviness, eating, after: The child or adult is not relieved by eating, is still hungry. The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
rubric_passages.Stomach, heaviness, weight, oppression: The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
rubric_passages.Stool: The Cina stool is not very copious, and often white.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat: The complaints are aggravated in summer; the heat affects the brain, arrests his functions, and on comes diarrhoea with green, slimy stools or white stools, and the child vomits.
rubric_passages.Stomach, heaviness: The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
rubric_passages.Stomach, heaviness, eating: The child or adult is not relieved by eating, is still hungry. The stomach is loaded and yet he is hungry.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, foot: the head is hot and the feet are cold in the sun.
rubric_passages.Eye, brilliant: glassy eyes, drawn mouth and white ring around the nose and mouth.
rubric_passages.Clinical, cyanosis: Blue ring or gray streak around the mouth.
rubric_passages.Mind, fear: Screams and trembles, with much anxiety on waking; whines and complains.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive, weakened individual who has become debilitated through prolonged illness, loss of vital fluids, or malarial influence. They are nervous, irritable, and hypersensitive to all external stimuli—touch, cold air, noise, odors—yet paradoxically apathetic and indifferent about daily life, sitting passively through meals and dreading any form of work.
profile.mental_state: The mind is weakened with poor memory, inability to concentrate, and misplacement of words. At night the mind races uncontrollably—building air castles, making grandiose plans, and theorizing—only to recognize these as foolish in the clear light of morning. There is a fundamental inability to control or direct mental effort, though this falls short of true insanity.
profile.emotional_pattern: Fearful and anxious at night, particularly of animals and creeping things, with a low-spirited, silent, and despairing disposition that can extend to suicidal ideation tempered by a lack of courage to act. They are emotionally flat and indifferent during the day yet tormented by nocturnal restlessness, reflecting a constitution caught between nervous over-excitability and profound exhaustion.

profile.personality: A withdrawn, solitary individual who prefers to be alone and avoids mental exertion. The mind is restless and overactive, crowded with racing thoughts, yet there is a marked forgetfulness and aversion to intellectual work.
profile.mental_state: The mind is overwhelmed by a flood of thoughts that prevent sleep, creating a paradox of mental overactivity combined with an inability to focus or follow through on intentions. There is significant forgetfulness, particularly regarding planned actions, and a deep reluctance to engage in any sustained mental effort.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of withdrawal and irritability, with a strong desire for solitude that suggests an underlying sensitivity to stimulation. There is a restless discontent marked by aversion to engagement with others or with work, reflecting the deeper sycotic and syphilitic miasmatic tendencies of deterioration and avoidance.

rubric_passages.Extremities: Pain in the limbs at night. Sensitive to sudden changes in the weather. Lame, bruised and stiff in all the limbs. Pains worse from motion. Syphilitic nodes on tibia.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The symptoms are worse at night from warmth of the bed, and when perspiring, like Mercurius. Worse from both heat and cold,
rubric_passages.Head: The pains in the head are violent; worse after eating; better by heat and pressure. Fullness in the whole head. Constriction. Pain in the cold forehead, which is ameliorated by heat. Tearing in the forehead before the menstrual flow. Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion, vertex: Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Aversion to food. Eructations, and vomiting. Tenderness of the stomach.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Catarrhal inflammation. Fig warts (Thuja). Ulcers. Many complaints from eating. Syphilis in all stages. Suppurating glands; chancres.
rubric_passages.Head, vertex: Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Inflammation of glans penis with profuse secretion of pus. Increased sexual desire. Swelling of prepuce with much itching. Warts on the prepuce and fraenum, bleeding when touched. Chancres on the prepuce of gangrenous odor. Inflamed and swollen chancres, hard, discharging pus. Indurated, or neglected chancres.

rubric_passages.Genitalia male, swelling: Swelling of prepuce with much itching. Inflamed and swollen chancres, hard, discharging pus.
