profile.personality: A chilly, scrofulous constitution prone to exhaustion and prostration, craving warmth and stimulating foods. The patient is excitable but easily depleted by mental or physical exertion, resembling a milder Calcarea type who is flabby, sickly, and pallid.
profile.mental_state: Mental exertion aggravates all complaints, producing a sensation as if paralyzed after sustained effort. The mind is easily overwhelmed, with headaches and increased suffering from any intellectual demand, and fasting further impairs cognitive function.
profile.emotional_pattern: There is a deep sensitivity and excitability, with suffering intensified by mental excitement. The patient is restless from constant itching and discomfort, driving them to scratch until raw, reflecting an underlying irritability born of chronic, unrelenting physical distress.

rubric_passages.Generalities: This remedy is an antipsoric, a deep-acting remedy. It runs very close to Calcarea, but is milder in its action. It has the same exhaustion from exertion, dyspnoea, sweating and coldness that we find in Calcarea.
rubric_passages.Clinical: The glands inflame, become swollen and suppurate. It causes cries and cures old ulcers. It has a scrofulous constitution. It is useful in chronic diarrhea, with enlarged glands, even in those who are flabby, sickly and pallid and who cannot go upstairs without losing, their breath.
rubric_passages.Ear: Shooting, stitching, tearing pains in inflamed parts. Red discharges from the ear date back to eruptive diseases.
rubric_passages.Face: This remedy has cured lupus on the face. Caries of the lower jaw. Open, bleeding cancer on the lower lip. Lupus exedens. Pain in all the joints of the face.
rubric_passages.Throat: The same cold feeling is described in the throat as in the nose-smarting and coldness. Mouth and throat full of mucus. The throat feels rough, as if full of sand. Dry spots in the throat. The throat looks glossy, shining as if vanished, in old atrophic catarrhs.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat: Hot air feels good everywhere. In old cases there is trouble with scrofulous glands, which are enlarged, and the patient wants the heat; goes to the register and turns the heat on, wants to feel the heat in the nose, throat and lungs.
rubric_passages.Ear, discharges: Red discharges from the ear date back to eruptive diseases.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: The glands inflame, become swollen and suppurate.
rubric_passages.Clinical, swelling: The glands inflame, become swollen and suppurate. It causes cries and cures old ulcers. It has a scrofulous constitution.
rubric_passages.External throat: Scrofula; swelling and suppuration of the glands of the neck.
It cures old, deep-seated, eating ulcers about the ankle and shin, with copious acrid discharge, formication and swollen glands, aggravation from bathing, extreme sensitiveness to the open air, only comfortable when very warm.
rubric_passages.Clinical, swelling, glands: The glands of the neck are enlarged in lines, like knotted rope, as in Hodgkins disease.
rubric_passages.Throat, dryness: Hawking of gum-like mucus, especially in the morning, fauces inflamed and dry. Suppuration of the glands of the throat.
rubric_passages.Face, inflammation: Sharp shooting, intolerable itching and thick crusts, with burning on right zygoma.
rubric_passages.Generalities, cold: Frontal headache with coldness. In a warm room the perspiration comes out, and it is cold, and the more he sweats the colder he gets.
rubric_passages.External throat, swelling: Scrofula; swelling and suppuration of the glands of the neck.
rubric_passages.External throat, swelling, cervical glan: The glands of the neck are enlarged in lines, like knotted rope, as in Hodgkins disease.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat, vital, lack of: They do not feel cold to touch, but they are cold subjectively, chilly.
rubric_passages.External throat, glands: Suppuration of the glands of the throat. The glands of the neck are enlarged in lines, like knotted rope, as in Hodgkins disease.
rubric_passages.External throat, glands, cervical: The glands of the neck were large and hard, the parotids especially.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat, vital: Patients going into tuberculosis have that desire for beat; chilly persons, They do not feel cold to touch, but they are cold subjectively, chilly.
rubric_passages.Face, parotid glands: The parotid gland is so much enlarged that it pushes the head to one side.
rubric_passages.Face, inflammation, parotid gland: The glands of the neck were large and hard, the parotids especially; she had foetid otorrhoea; her eyes were inflamed and suppurating.
rubric_passages.Back: Eruption on the back like shingles. Scrofulous ulcer on the back. Burning, bruised pain in the coccyx, worse from touch.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Burning, bruised pain in the coccyx, worse from touch.
rubric_passages.Chest: The chest fills up with mucus and he feels relieved after expectoration, but after he empties the chest it feels raw. Left mamma inflamed, suppurating, with a feeling of fullness in the chest.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Tetter on the hands; blisters oozing after scratching. Diseases of the nails. Hard, thickened places on the hands of workmen, with deep cracks.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: It has the same exhaustion from exertion, dyspnoea, sweating and coldness that we find in Calcarea.

profile.personality: A deeply sensitive and conflicted individual who craves solitude yet fears being alone, creating a fundamental tension in their social existence. They are low-spirited and weighed down by an atmosphere of dread, as though surrounded by frightful and distressing impressions that others cannot perceive.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by a pervasive sense of dread and worry, with the atmosphere itself seeming full of frightful things. There is a characteristic indecisiveness about human contact — fearing solitude while simultaneously dreading the burden of company. This mental state is particularly associated with suppression, emerging when natural discharges or expressions have been driven inward.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional experience is one of low-spiritedness and oppressive anxiety, rooted in an irreconcilable conflict between the need for others and the desire to avoid them. There is a quality of being tormented by invisible forces, as though the surrounding world is charged with distressing presences. The emotional life reflects the sycotic miasm — a deep melancholy arising from suppression and concealment.

rubric_passages.Bladder: Constant urging to urinate, most painful tenesmus. Flow stopping and starting. The urethra is painful to pressure. Micturition is remarkably slow, only a feeble stream because of the smallness of the urethra.
rubric_passages.Chest: Scirrhus of the breast with induration and ulceration. Scirrhus of the left mamma with stitches in the shoulder;
rubric_passages.Generalities: It has pain on lying down and preparatory to going to sleep. An electric shock; twitching, jerking, as if a faradic battery had been turned on. It has also a general febrile condition, but nothing very striking.
rubric_passages.Head: On the outer head we have a part of the manifestations of Clematis vesicular eruptions with great itching, stinging and crawling.
rubric_passages.Skin: It has vesicular eruptions almost erysipelatous in character. Vesicular eruptions filling with yellow fluid and with induration under the vesicles. It produces eruptions very closely related to herpes and eczema, and they spread.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Inability to evacuate all the urine at once. When beginning to urinate it burns the worst, while urinating it sticks in urethra, and after urinating it still continues to burn.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: While it has both sides, strange to say there is more trouble in the glands that are on the right side of the body than on the left. Strange to say, the right side of the body is more commonly affected than the left.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is seldom indicated in the very first stage of gonorrhoea during the highest inflammation, but in those cases that are inclined to hang on. Then come the sequelae if gonorrhea be suppressed. Inflammation of the testes is common, and this is one of the medicines suitable.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Swelling of the glands of the groin is a striking feature even when connected with scirrhus. It is connected also with suppressed gonorrhea, and with rheumatism of the joints.
rubric_passages.Eye: Burning, and smarting of the eyes; worse from closing them. Inflammation of the iris. Eyes inflamed, protruded, dim.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Pain and swelling of the right spermatic cord; this is worse at night, worse from walking and from the warmth of the bed. Pain in the testes, drawing. Painful, inflamed and swollen testes. Orchitis with much painful swelling and hardness.
rubric_passages.Urine: Discharge from the urethra of thick pus. Intermittent flow of the urine. Urine stops and starts with the chordee still present.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, involuntary: He always feels as if there was a little more, and when he appears to have finished it will keep dribbling away.
rubric_passages.Eye, inflammation: Burning, and smarting of the eyes; worse from closing them. Inflammation of the iris. Eyes inflamed, protruded, dim.
rubric_passages.Eye, inflammation, conjunctiva: About the eyes we have vesicular eruptions. If seen in one stage it will be vesicular, and if later, it will be seen as an ulceration.
rubric_passages.Head, eruption: On the outer head we have a part of the manifestations of Clematis vesicular eruptions with great itching, stinging and crawling.
rubric_passages.Head, eruption, crusts, scabs: On the outer head we have a part of the manifestations of Clematis vesicular eruptions with great itching, stinging and crawling. Now what is true of the eruption here will be true of the Clematis eruption everywhere. It is aggravated from washing.
rubric_passages.Skin, eruptions: Eruption of vesicles and pustules from the former exuded a clear, watery secretion, from the latter a purulent fluid. Yellow vesicles and yellow pustules. Both are common to this remedy. Dark, burning eruptions with violent itching.
rubric_passages.Skin, eruptions, herpetic: Vesicular eruptions on the body. Herpetic eruptions here and there it has a herpetic constitution. Herpes that ulcerate. Ichorous, spreading ulcers. Simple and graver forms of herpes. Herpes zoster about the body.
rubric_passages.Teeth: Stitching and drawing pains in the teeth; worse at night; better for a short time from holding cold water in the mouth; better from drawing in cold air; worse from the warmth of the bed. The toothache is tolerable during the day, but as soon as he lies down in bed and assumes a horizontal position it increases to an intolerable degree.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: Inflammation of the testes is common, and this is one of the medicines suitable. It is the nature of this remedy to infiltrate and inflame tissues, and, hence it is useful in those cases of gonorrhoea where they have been slow in passing away.

profile.personality: A slow, exhausted, paralytic type who is behind time in all actions and responses. The Cocculus individual is one who has worn themselves out through devoted caretaking—nursing sick loved ones with deep anxiety, prolonged vigilance, and sacrifice of sleep. They are tremulous, awkward, and hypersensitive to all external stimuli including noise, motion, and jarring.
profile.mental_state: The mind approaches a blank, imbecile-like state where comprehension is profoundly slowed, words cannot be found, and recently read material is immediately forgotten. Ideas become fixed and immovable in the mind, giving an appearance of stupor, yet the patient may retain full internal awareness despite being unable to respond outwardly. Time perception is severely distorted, with long periods seeming to pass in moments.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern arises from prolonged grief, vexation, and anxiety on behalf of loved ones, producing a state of nervous prostration that deepens into fearfulness and dread. There is a pervasive sense that something awful is about to happen, coupled with a fear of death. The patient is extremely irritable and cannot bear the least noise or contradiction, yet underneath is a profound emotional exhaustion from having given too much of themselves in caregiving.

rubric_passages.Back, pain: The Cocculus headaches and backaches, pains and distress are present.
rubric_passages.Chest: The heart is weak, pulse feeble.
rubric_passages.Chill: Intermittent fevers with pains in the limbs, especially in the knees and bones of the legs, with that peculiar stiffness, nausea, and loathing of food.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Paralytic weakness in the limbs, numbness, jerking of the muscles, twitching, quivering, loss of sensation, loss of power, muscular weakness in all the limbs. Numbness and paralytic feeling in the limbs.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis of the lower extremities, proceeding from the small of the back. Arising from cold, from the abuse of Mercury. Paralysis of the lower limbs, with stiffness, numbness and bruised feeling.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis, painless: It was the case of a little girl with paralysis of lower extremities after diphtheria and no hope was given. But Doctor Moore (he was then an Octogenarian) looked over the case.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Cocculus slows down all the activities of the body and mind, producing a sort of paralytic weakness. Behind time in all its actions.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Copious menstrual flow, menses too soon; last too long. Catamenia two weeks before the time. In women prostrated from grief and from anxiety, and from prolonged loss of sleep, menses come too soon, are copious and prolonged.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Violent, cramping pains in the bowels, clutching pains in the uterus during menstruation.
rubric_passages.Head: Congestion of the head, pressing, throbbing headache. Headache as if the skull would burst, or like a great valve opening and shutting. Sick headache with vertigo.
rubric_passages.Mind: You can hardly see what is coming when the mental activities are slowed down, from anxiety, and loss of sleep, such as we have in nursing. The mind appears like approaching imbecility, and as you look upon the true Cocculus case you wonder if that patient has not been growing insane for a year or two, because the mind seems almost a blank.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Metallic taste in the mouth. Bitter taste in the mouth. Sour, nauseous taste in the mouth, and no food tempts him.
rubric_passages.Rectum: A paralytic condition of the rectum. Inability to press at stool. Urging to stool and burning in rectum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Disposition to stool, but peristaltic motion in upper intestines is wanting.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Sleeplessness from long nursing and from night watching; that is a symptom that I have called your attention to so often. Anxious, frightful dreams; ill effects from loss of sleep and night watching.
rubric_passages.Sleep, restless: Slightest loss of sleep tells on him.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Spasms of the stomach. Violent attacks of gastralgia, violent cramp of the stomach. Griping, pinching, constrictive pain.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Violent attacks of gastralgia, violent cramp of the stomach. Griping, pinching, constrictive pain.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: The vertigo is visually attended with nausea. A Cocculus case cannot look out of the car window, cannot look down from the boat and see water moving, without nausea immediately.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: The pain in the bowels feels as if the intestines were pinched between sharp stones. This causes fainting and vomiting. Colicky pains in the bowels great distension of the abdomen. Tearing, cutting, spasmodic pains in the bowels.
rubric_passages.Back, weakness: She is exhausted; unable to sustain any mental or physical effort; weak in the knees, weak in the back.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness: Faintness on moving the body, fainting from pain in the bowels, from colic.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: With all this slowing down of the thoughts and activities the patient remains extremely sensitive to suffering, sensitive to pain.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: I remember a case of paralysis of the lower extremities that was prescribed for by a very careful homeopathic physician many years ago. He studied the case carefully and gave Cocculus c.m. It was not many days before the child began to move the legs, and the condition was perfectly cleared up.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: He cannot endure any muscular exertion, because he is weak; he is tired. First comes this slowness, then a sort of visible paralytic condition, and then complete paralysis.
